hero_tagline: My VR-heavy corner of the internet with the games I play, my sites, updates, and more.
about: Hey, I'm bloodedvr. I like Animal Company, Roblox, Minecraft, VR games, and a lot more. This site is where I share what I play, what I make, and whatever cool stuff I'm into.
more: I like retro glowing UI and game-style menus.
I enjoy making websites and trying creative ideas.
This site runs with Python and can be edited from the admin panel.
announcements: Admin panel can update the homepage in real time.

posts.title: Welcome To My Site
posts.body: This is my personal website where I post my games, links, announcements, and more stuff.

posts.title: What I Play
posts.body: Right now I like playing Animal Company, Roblox, Minecraft, VR games, and other fun stuff.
